selection.selection_note: Judged only owned repair batch 34 against full standard_source_table metadata, semantic_brief, S-57/OpenCPN structure, OpenCPN provider witnesses, Chart No.1 parity crop where available, and actual batch-34 Helm candidate SVG/renders on branch.

verdicts.expected: BCNGEN64 is a BOYLAT/BCNGEN red-white full-chart mark with BOYSHP5 and COLOUR3,1,3,1; it must preserve the compact BCNGEN beacon/spar body and four ordered horizontal bands red/white/red/white.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes before style review: the candidate preserves the BCNGEN/BOYLAT beacon class, compact spar-like body, black outline and stem, and exactly four horizontal bands in the required red/white/red/white order. Visual parity is acceptable in Helm style; the candidate is cleaner/larger than the tiny OpenCPN raster witness, but does not create dangerous beacon, buoy, topmark, or colour-pattern confusion. No final approval implied.
verdicts.observed: Candidate render is a compact vertical BCNGEN beacon/spar body with black outline and stem. The body is divided into four ordered horizontal bands: red, white, red, white, matching the COLOUR3,1,3,1 repair requirement from the prior failed judge pass.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
